methodsAttempted.query: site:ritsumei.ac.jp Ritsumeikan University ChatGPT generative AI policy students academic integrity guidelines
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl returned no English official-domain results for a central generative-AI policy.

methodsAttempted.query: site:ritsumei.ac.jp 立命館大学 生成AI ChatGPT ガイドライン 授業 レポート 学生
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl found the official IT support pointer page, the student-facing teaching division PDF, and lower-specificity ITL/news/faculty materials.

methodsAttempted.query: site:it.support.ritsumei.ac.jp/hc/ja/articles 立命館 Microsoft Bing チャット エンタープライズ 生成 AI
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl found public IT support pages for information-security cautions and Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat, plus sign-in-limited supplement and staff guidance links.
Robots.txt permits public help-center article paths used here and disallows search, request, auth, and ticket paths that were not crawled.
Direct HTTP access to www.ritsumei.ac.jp returned a request-denied page from this worker environment, but Firecrawl extracted the public student PDF. No login, CAPTCHA, or WAF bypass was attempted.

artifacts.summary: Official-source discovery found a public Ritsumeikan IT support page that points to teaching-division generative-AI guidance, a public student-facing PDF from the teaching division, a public IT support page summarizing information-security cautions for generative AI, and a public Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat page. Staff-facing AI guidance and the detailed security supplement redirected to Microsoft sign-in and were recorded as inaccessible rather than used as claim evidence.

artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: テクノロジーの進展を考えると、生成系 AI の使用そのものを完全に禁止することは現実的ではありません。したがって、生成系 AI の活用にあたっては、教育・学修の注意事項・留意事項として学生及び教員に向けて周知を図っていく

artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: 生成系 AI による回答をそのまま試験・レポート課題等に用いることは、著作権侵害等の研究倫理上の問題につながる可能性があるだけでなく、皆さん自身の学びや成長につながりません。また、使用の程度や内容によっては、盗作・剽窃と見なされ、不正行為として学生懲戒の対象となる可能性があります。

artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: 生成系AIの利用にあたっては以下の危険性があります。入力した情報が第三者への回答に利用されることがあり、情報漏洩に繋がる。出力された結果に第三者の著作物が含まれることがあり、利用方法によっては知的財産権の侵害にあたる。

artifacts.notes: Approved as a narrow student-facing claim from the teaching division PDF; not presented as a universal permission rule.
Approved because the source directly tells students to follow course instructions when provided.
Approved as a privacy/data-handling caution tied to the public student guidance.
Approved with may/could wording because the source conditions disciplinary risk on degree and content of use.

artifacts.title: Ritsumeikan University generative AI guidance staged evidence
artifacts.summary: Staged evidence for Ritsumeikan University is based on public official Japanese-language sources: the teaching division's student-facing generative-AI PDF, Ritsumeikan IT support's public security-cautions page, and the public Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat support page. Claims are limited to student-facing cautions, course-instruction deference, privacy/data-handling cautions, conditional academic-integrity risk, Copilot Chat availability, and IT security risks.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
Staff-facing AI guidance and the detailed security supplement redirected to sign-in and were not used as evidence.
Direct HTTP access to www.ritsumei.ac.jp returned a request-denied page from this worker environment; Firecrawl successfully extracted the public student PDF.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
